title_en: The Shocking Truth About Your Bread
title_es: La Impactante Verdad Sobre Tu Pan
hook_en: Did you know your bread could be toxic?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que tu pan podría ser tóxico?
key_message: Potassium bromate, a legal additive in the US, is banned in many countries due to its potential carcinogenic effects.
visual_elements: split-screen: fresh bread vs. ingredients list
_source_regulation_context:
ADDITIVES BANNED IN OTHER COUNTRIES BUT LEGAL IN US:
  • Potassium Bromate: Bread, flour, baked goods — Banned in: EU, UK, Canada, Brazil, China — Health concern: Classified as possibly carcinogenic (Group 2B) by IARC

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_es: ¿El Aumento de la Obesidad: Un Fracaso Regulatorio?
hook_en: Why are more Americans obese today than ever?
hook_es: ¿Por qué más estadounidenses son obesos hoy que nunca?
key_message: Lack of strict food regulations in the US contributes to the rising obesity rates.
_source_regulation_context:
